audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 162-164 implement the staleness assertion verbatim: `if (report.observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold) revert Errors.StaleFeedData()`. The per-asset `feedInfo.stalenessThreshold` is loaded from storage correctly, is guaranteed non-zero by `_applyFeedInfoUpdates`, and the check is applied to every report in the post-verification loop with no bypass paths.
